com.rscja.deviceapi

Class RFIDWithUHFSerialPortUR4

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rscja.deviceapi.Device
      • com.rscja.deviceapi.RFIDWithUHFBase
        • com.rscja.deviceapi.RFIDWithUHFSerialPortUR4
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IMultipleAntenna, IUHF, IUR4

    public class RFIDWithUHFSerialPortUR4
extends RFIDWithUHFBase
implements IUR4
    UHF模块UR4串口通信操作类
    UHF module UR4 serial communication operation class
    操作URA4设备以及UHF模块相关接口
    Operate URA4 devices and related interfaces of UHF modules.

    操作步骤：
    Steps:
    第一步：连接通过 init(String com)连接读写器串口。同时可以设置回调接口 setConnectionStateCallback(ConnectionStateCallback btStateCallback)监听连接状态。
    Step 1: Connect to the serial port of the reader via init(String com). At the same time, you can set the callback interface setConnectionStateCallback(ConnectionStateCallback btStateCallback) to monitor the connection state.

    第二步： 如果是设置参数，连接成功之后，调用对应的函数设置参数、读写操作。 如果是盘点标签先调用setInventoryCallback(IUHFInventoryCallback inventoryCallback)设置标签回调接口，有标签数据就会回调这个接口。 然后在调用startInventoryTag()函数开始执行盘点。 注意: 在盘点标签的时候rfid模块只能响应stopInventory()函数。
    Step 2: If it is to set parameters, after the connection is successful, call the corresponding function to set parameters, read and write operations. * If the inventory label is to call setInventoryCallback(IUHFInventoryCallback inventoryCallback) first to set the label callback interface, this interface will be called back when there is label data. * Then call the startInventoryTag() function to start the inventory. * Note: The rfid module can only respond to the stopInventory() function when inventorying tags.

    第三步：退出app调用 free()断开连接，如果断开之前正在盘点，请先停止盘点，在断开连接。
    Step 3: Exit the app and call free() to disconnect. If you are taking inventory before disconnecting, please stop the inventory first and then disconnecting.


    注意事项:
    1. App工程需要导入jna-5.4.0.jar 和 jna-platform-5.4.0.jar
    The App project needs to import jna-5.4.0.jar and jna-platform-5.4.0.jar
    windows系统注意事项:
    2. 需要依赖,UHFAPI.dll 和 hidapi.dll ，将这两个文件保存到程序根目录。也可以通过调用setDllOrSOFilePath函数来设置要加载的dll路径。
    2. Need to depend on, UHFAPI.dll and hidapi.dll, save these two files to the program root directory. You can also set the dll path to load by calling the setDllOrSOFilePath function.
    Linux系统注意事项:
    2.需要依赖 libTagReader.so ，将这个文件保存到命令行根目录。也可以通过调用setDllOrSOFilePath函数来设置要加载的so路径
    2. Need to depend on, libTagReader.so, save these two files to the program root directory. You can also set the so path to load by calling the setDllOrSOFilePath function.





    Example Usage:
     public void RFIDWithUHFSerialPortUR4Test(){
      RFIDWithUHFSerialPortUR4 rfidUr4=new RFIDWithUHFSerialPortUR4();
      boolean result=rfidUr4.init("COMxxx");
      if(!result){
       //connect fail
       return;
        }
      //connect success
      rfidUr4.setConnectionStateCallback(new ConnectionStateCallback() {
       @Override
       public void getState(ConnectionState status, Object device) {
        if(status == ConnectionState.DISCONNECTED){
        System.out.println("disconnect");
        }
        }
       });
      //configuration parameters
       //rfidUr4.setFrequencyMode(xx)
       //rfidUr4.setPower(AntNameEnum.ANT1,30);
      rfidUr4.setInventoryCallback(new IUHFInventoryCallback() {
       @Override
        public void callback(UHFTAGInfo uhftagInfo) {
         String epc= uhftagInfo.getEPC();
         String rssi= uhftagInfo.getRssi();
         //........
         }
        });

       if(rfidUr4.startInventoryTag()){
         //success
        }else{
         //fail
        }
       rfidUr4.stopInventory();
       //.................

       //disconnect uhf
       rfidUr4.free();
       }

      boolean blockWriteData(java.lang.String accessPwd, int bank, int ptr, int cnt, java.lang.String writeData)
      将数据写入标签(支持大数据标签写入)、当需要写入的标签数据比较大可以使用此函数写入(Write data into tag(support big-sized data writing), user could use this function when big-sized data need to be written.)
      boolean blockWriteData(java.lang.String accessPwd, int filterBank, int filterPtr, int filterCnt, java.lang.String filterData, int bank, int ptr, int cnt, java.lang.String writeData)
      将数据写入指定标签(支持大数据标签写入)、当需要写入的标签数据比较大可以使用此函数写入(Write data into tag(support big-sized data writing), user could use this function when big-sized data need to be written.)
      boolean eraseData(java.lang.String accessPwd, int bank, int ptr, int cnt)
      擦除数据，被擦除的数据块其内容将被设置成0.
      boolean eraseData(java.lang.String accessPwd, int filterBank, int filterPtr, int filterCnt, java.lang.String filterData, int bank, int ptr, int cnt)
      擦除指定标签的数据，被擦除的数据块其内容将被设置成0.(Clean specific tag data, data block after cleaned will be set to 0.

      boolean killTag(java.lang.String killPwd)
      销毁指定标签 ,默认密码(0x00 0x00 0x00 0x00)不能执行销毁
      Destroy the label, the default password (0x00 0x00 0x00 0x00) cannot be destroyed
      boolean killTag(java.lang.String killPwd, int filterBank, int filterPtr, int filterCnt, java.lang.String filterData)
      销毁指定标签 ,默认密码(0x00 0x00 0x00 0x00)不能执行销毁
      Destroy the specified label, the default password (0x00 0x00 0x00 0x00) cannot be destroyed
      boolean lockMem(java.lang.String accessPwd, int bank, int ptr, int cnt, java.lang.String filterData, java.lang.String lockCode)
      锁指定标签(Lock specified label) 示例代码:比如锁定EPC区和USER区 (Sample code: such as locking EPC area and USER area) List lockBank=new ArrayList<>(); lockBank.add(IUHF.LockBank_EPC); lockBank.add(IUHF.LockBank_USER); int lockMode =IUHF.LockMode_LOCK; String hexLockCode=generateLockCode(lockBank,lockMode); lockMem(accessPwd,bank,ptr,cnt,filterData,hexLockCode);
      boolean lockMem(java.lang.String accessPwd, java.lang.String lockCode)
      锁标签(lock label) 示例代码:比如锁定EPC区和USER区 (Sample code: such as locking EPC area and USER area) List lockBank=new ArrayList<>(); lockBank.add(IUHF.LockBank_EPC); lockBank.add(IUHF.LockBank_USER); int lockMode =IUHF.LockMode_LOCK; String hexLockCode=generateLockCode(lockBank,lockMode); lockMem(accessPwd,hexLockCode);

      java.lang.String readData(java.lang.String accessPwd, int filterBank, int filterPtr, int filterCnt, java.lang.String filterData, int bank, int ptr, int cnt)
      读取指定标签的数据(Read the data of the specified tag)
      UHFTAGInfo readTagFromBuffer()
      接收循环盘点的标签数据
      Receive label data for cycle count
      创建一个子线程调用此方法获取标签数据，此方法非阻塞模式。此方法只负责从数据缓冲区获取标签数据，如果数据缓冲区没有标签数据，将返回NULL。
      Create a child thread to call this method to get tag data, this method is non-blocking mode.

      boolean uhfJump2Boot()
      uhf固件进入boot模式准备升级,调用此函数后需要延时2秒再调用 uhfStartUpdate() (uhf firmware enters boot mode to prepare for upgrade)
      boolean uhfJump2BootToSTM32()
      uhf主板进入boot模式准备升级,调用此函数后需要延时2秒再调用 uhfStartUpdate() (uhf firmware enters boot mode to prepare for upgrade)
      boolean uhfStartUpdate()
      开始升级UHF固件,调用此函数后需要延时2秒再调用 uhfUpdating(byte[] buff) (Start to upgrade UHF firmware)
      boolean uhfStopUpdate()
      停止升级UHF固件(Stop upgrading UHF firmware)
      boolean uhfUpdating(byte[] buff)
      发送uhf升级包 (Send uhf upgrade package)

      将数据写入标签（write data to label）

      • setDllOrSOFilePath

        public void setDllOrSOFilePath(java.lang.String directory,
                               java.lang.String fileName)
        设置加载的dll文件路径
        Set the loaded dll file path 备注:如果需要使用此函数，请在调用init函数之前调用此函数。
        Note: If you need to use this function, please call this function before calling the init function.
        Parameters:
        directory - dll文件目录,如果文件目录为null，将采用可运行的jar文件执行路径
        dll file directory, if the file directory is null, the executable jar file execution path will be used
        fileName - dll文件名称，如果文件名为null，将使用默认文件名UHFAPI.dll
        dll file name, if the file name is null, the default file name UHFAPI.dll will be used

        Parameters:

      • getVersion

        public java.lang.String getVersion()
        读取UHF模块版本号(Read UHF module version)

        getVersion in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        返回模块版本，null为读取失败(returns the module version, null means read failure)

      • getFrequencyMode

        public int getFrequencyMode()
        读取模块的频率
        Read frequency mode of module
        Specified by:
        getFrequencyMode in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        返回工作模式，返回-1为失败 (return work mode, return -1 means failure)
        0x01：China Standard(840~845MHz)
        0x02：China Standard2(920~925MHz)
        0x04：Europe Standard(865~868MHz)
        0x08：USA(902-928MHz)
        0x16：Korea(917~923MHz)
        0x32: Japan(916.8~920.8MHz)
        0x33: South Africa(915~919MHz)
        0x34: New Zealand
        0x80 Morocco

      • setFrequencyMode

        public boolean setFrequencyMode(byte freMode)
        设置模块的频率模式
        Setup frequency mode of module
        Specified by:
        setFrequencyMode in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        freMode - 0x01：China Standard(840~845MHz)
        0x02：China Standard2(920~925MHz)
        0x04：Europe Standard(865~868MHz)
        0x08：USA(902-928MHz)
        0x16：Korea(917~923MHz)
        0x32: Japan(916.8~920.8MHz)
        0x33: South Africa(915~919MHz)
        0x34: New Zealand
        0x80 Morocco
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • startInventoryTag

        public boolean startInventoryTag()
        开始循环识别标签。 获取标签数据有两种方式，只能二选一，推荐使用方式一。
        Begin looping through the identification labels. There are two ways to obtain label data, only one of the two can be selected. It is recommended to use method one.

        方式一:通过 setInventoryCallback(IUHFInventoryCallback inventoryCallback) 这个回调接口获取标签数据，需要在开始盘点之前调用setInventoryCallback方法。
        Method 1: Get the label data through the callback interface setInventoryCallback(IUHFInventoryCallback inventoryCallback), you need to call the setInventoryCallback method before starting the inventory.

        方式二:创建一个子线程，在子线程里面通过调用readTagFromBuffer()方法获取标签数据。详情请参见readTagFromBuffer()。
        Method 2: Create a sub-thread, and get the tag data by calling the readTagFromBuffer() method in the sub-thread. See readTagFromBuffer() for details.

        备注：开启循环识别标签后模块只能响应stopInventory()函数 。
        Note: The module can only respond to the stopInventory() function after the loop identification tag is turned on.
        Specified by:
        startInventoryTag in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • setInventoryCallback

        public void setInventoryCallback(IUHFInventoryCallback inventoryCallback)
        设置盘点回调接口，接收循环盘点到的标签数据
        Set the inventory callback interface to receive the label data from the cyclic inventory
        备注：需要在开始循环盘点startInventoryTag()之前调用此方法。
        Note: This method needs to be called before starting the loop inventory startInventoryTag().
        Specified by:
        setInventoryCallback in interface IUHF
        Overrides:
        setInventoryCallback in class RFIDWithUHFBase
        Parameters:
        inventoryCallback - 盘点回调接口(inventory callback interface)

      • getConnectStatus

        public ConnectionState getConnectStatus()
        获取连接状态(get connection status)
        Specified by:
        getConnectStatus in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        connection status

      • readTagFromBuffer

        public UHFTAGInfo readTagFromBuffer()
        接收循环盘点的标签数据
        Receive label data for cycle count
        创建一个子线程调用此方法获取标签数据，此方法非阻塞模式。此方法只负责从数据缓冲区获取标签数据，如果数据缓冲区没有标签数据，将返回NULL。
        Create a child thread to call this method to get tag data, this method is non-blocking mode. This method is only responsible for getting the tag data from the data buffer. If the data buffer has no tag data, it will return NULL.

        备注：推荐使用回调函数的方式接收数据 setInventoryCallback(IUHFInventoryCallback inventoryCallback)
        Note: It is recommended to use the callback function to receive data setInventoryCallback(IUHFInventoryCallback inventoryCallback)
        Specified by:
        readTagFromBuffer in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        返回标签数据，当前数据缓冲区没有标签数据则返回null。
        returns the tag data, or null if there is no tag data in the current data buffer.
        实例代码(Example code):
          Thread thread=new Thread(new Runnable() {
           @Override
           public void run() {
            while (isInventory){
             UHFTAGInfo taginfo=readTagFromBuffer();
             if(taginfo==null){
             Thread.sleep(10);
             }
             String epc= taginfo.getEPC();
             String rssi= taginfo.getRssi();
            }
           }
           });

      • stopInventory

        public boolean stopInventory()
        停止循环盘点标签(Stop cycle count labels)
        Specified by:
        stopInventory in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • lockMem

        public boolean lockMem(java.lang.String accessPwd,
                       int bank,
                       int ptr,
                       int cnt,
                       java.lang.String filterData,
                       java.lang.String lockCode)
        锁指定标签(Lock specified label) 示例代码:比如锁定EPC区和USER区 (Sample code: such as locking EPC area and USER area) List lockBank=new ArrayList<>(); lockBank.add(IUHF.LockBank_EPC); lockBank.add(IUHF.LockBank_USER); int lockMode =IUHF.LockMode_LOCK; String hexLockCode=generateLockCode(lockBank,lockMode); lockMem(accessPwd,bank,ptr,cnt,filterData,hexLockCode);
        Specified by:
        lockMem in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        accessPwd - ACCESS PASSWORD (4 bites)
        bank - 标签的存储区(Storage areas for) IUHF.Bank_RESERVED、IUHF.Bank_EPC、IUHF.Bank_TID、IUHF.Bank_USER
        ptr - 过滤起始地址,单位:bit (Filter start address, unit: bit)
        cnt - 过滤数据长度,单位:bit,当过滤的数据长度为0时，表示无过滤。(Filter data length (unit: bit), when the filtered data length is 0, it means no filtering.)
        filterData - 过滤数据(filterData filter data)
        lockCode - 锁定码(lockCode lock code)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • lockMem

        public boolean lockMem(java.lang.String accessPwd,
                       java.lang.String lockCode)
        锁标签(lock label) 示例代码:比如锁定EPC区和USER区 (Sample code: such as locking EPC area and USER area) List lockBank=new ArrayList<>(); lockBank.add(IUHF.LockBank_EPC); lockBank.add(IUHF.LockBank_USER); int lockMode =IUHF.LockMode_LOCK; String hexLockCode=generateLockCode(lockBank,lockMode); lockMem(accessPwd,hexLockCode);
        Specified by:
        lockMem in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        accessPwd - ACCESS PASSWORD (4 bites)
        lockCode - 锁定码，可以通过generateLockCode(ArrayList lockBank,int lockMode)方法来获取
        lockCode lock code, which can be obtained by generateLockCode(ArrayList lockBank,int lockMode) method
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • inventorySingleTag

        public UHFTAGInfo inventorySingleTag()
        单次盘点标签(Single Inventory Label)
        Specified by:
        inventorySingleTag in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        返回标签数据，null表示盘点失败(returns the label data, null means the inventory failed)

      • readData

        public java.lang.String readData(java.lang.String accessPwd,
                                 int bank,
                                 int ptr,
                                 int cnt)
        读取标签的数据(Read tag data)
        Specified by:
        readData in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        accessPwd - 访问密码，4个字节 (accessPwd access password, 4 bytes)
        bank - 读取的存储区(Banks read by) IUHF.Bank_RESERVED、IUHF.Bank_EPC、IUHF.Bank_TID、IUHF.Bank_USER
        ptr - 读取的起始地址,单位:字 (The starting address of reading ,unit: word)
        cnt - 读取的数据长度,单位:字 (read data length ,unit: word)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • readData

        public java.lang.String readData(java.lang.String accessPwd,
                                 int filterBank,
                                 int filterPtr,
                                 int filterCnt,
                                 java.lang.String filterData,
                                 int bank,
                                 int ptr,
                                 int cnt)
        读取指定标签的数据(Read the data of the specified tag)
        Specified by:
        readData in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        accessPwd - 访问密码，4个字节 (accessPwd access password, 4 bytes)
        filterBank - 过滤的存储区(Filtered banks) IUHF.Bank_EPC、IUHF.Bank_TID、IUHF.Bank_USER
        filterPtr - 过滤的起始地址(the starting address of the filter)
        filterCnt - 过滤数据长度,单位:bit,当过滤的数据长度为0时，表示无过滤。(filterCnt Filter data length ,unit: bit, when the filtered data length is 0, it means no filtering)
        filterData - 过滤数据(filter data)
        bank - 读取的存储区(Banks read by) IUHF.Bank_RESERVED、IUHF.Bank_EPC、IUHF.Bank_TID、IUHF.Bank_USER
        ptr - 读取的起始地址,单位:字 (The starting address of reading ,unit: word)
        cnt - 读取的数据长度,单位:字 (read data length ,unit: word)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • writeData

        public boolean writeData(java.lang.String accessPwd,
                         int bank,
                         int ptr,
                         int cnt,
                         java.lang.String data)
        将数据写入标签（write data to label）
        Specified by:
        writeData in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        accessPwd - 访问密码，4个字节（accessPwd access password, 4 bytes）
        bank - 写入的存储区(storage area)IUHF.Bank_RESERVED、IUHF.Bank_EPC、IUHF.Bank_TID、IUHF.Bank_USER
        ptr - 写入的起始地址,单位:字 (start address,unit: word)
        cnt - 写入的数据长度,单位:字 (data length(Word is unit, cannot be 0))
        data - 写入的数据,十六进制格式 (data format should be hexvalue)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • writeData

        public boolean writeData(java.lang.String accessPwd,
                         int filterBank,
                         int filterPtr,
                         int filterCnt,
                         java.lang.String filterData,
                         int bank,
                         int ptr,
                         int cnt,
                         java.lang.String writeData)
        将数据写入指定标签（write data to label）
        Specified by:
        writeData in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        accessPwd - 访问密码，4个字节 （accessPwd access password, 4 bytes）
        filterBank - 过滤的存储区(Filtered banks) IUHF.Bank_EPC、IUHF.Bank_TID、IUHF.Bank_USER
        filterPtr - 过滤的起始地址(the starting address of the filter)
        filterCnt - 过滤数据长度,单位:bit,当过滤的数据长度为0时，表示无过滤。(filterCnt Filter data length ,unit: bit, when the filtered data length is 0, it means no filtering)
        filterData - 过滤数据(filter data)
        bank - 写入的存储区(storage area) IUHF.Bank_RESERVED、IUHF.Bank_EPC、IUHF.Bank_TID、IUHF.Bank_USER
        ptr - 写入的起始地址,单位:字 (start address,unit: word)
        cnt - 写入的数据长度,单位:字 (data length(Word is unit, cannot be 0))
        writeData - 写入的数据,十六进制格式 (data format should be hexvalue)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • blockWriteData

        public boolean blockWriteData(java.lang.String accessPwd,
                              int bank,
                              int ptr,
                              int cnt,
                              java.lang.String writeData)
        将数据写入标签(支持大数据标签写入)、当需要写入的标签数据比较大可以使用此函数写入(Write data into tag(support big-sized data writing), user could use this function when big-sized data need to be written.)
        Specified by:
        blockWriteData in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        accessPwd - 访问密码，4个字节 （accessPwd access password, 4 bytes）
        bank - 写入的存储区(storage area) IUHF.Bank_RESERVED、IUHF.Bank_EPC、IUHF.Bank_TID、IUHF.Bank_USER
        ptr - 写入的起始地址,单位:字 (start address,unit: word)
        cnt - 写入的数据长度,单位:字 (data length(Word is unit, cannot be 0))
        writeData - 写入的数据,十六进制格式 (data format should be hexvalue)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • blockWriteData

        public boolean blockWriteData(java.lang.String accessPwd,
                              int filterBank,
                              int filterPtr,
                              int filterCnt,
                              java.lang.String filterData,
                              int bank,
                              int ptr,
                              int cnt,
                              java.lang.String writeData)
        将数据写入指定标签(支持大数据标签写入)、当需要写入的标签数据比较大可以使用此函数写入(Write data into tag(support big-sized data writing), user could use this function when big-sized data need to be written.)
        Specified by:
        blockWriteData in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        accessPwd - 访问密码，4个字节 （accessPwd access password, 4 bytes）
        filterBank - 过滤的存储区(Filtered banks) IUHF.Bank_EPC、IUHF.Bank_TID、IUHF.Bank_USER
        filterPtr - 过滤的起始地址(the starting address of the filter)
        filterCnt - 过滤数据长度,单位:bit,当过滤的数据长度为0时，表示无过滤。(filterCnt Filter data length ,unit: bit, when the filtered data length is 0, it means no filtering)
        filterData - 过滤数据(filter data)
        bank - 写入的存储区(storage area) IUHF.Bank_RESERVED、IUHF.Bank_EPC、IUHF.Bank_TID、IUHF.Bank_USER
        ptr - 写入的起始地址,单位:字 (start address,unit: word)
        cnt - 写入的数据长度,单位:字 (data length(Word is unit, cannot be 0))
        writeData - 写入的数据,十六进制格式 (data format should be hexvalue)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • eraseData

        public boolean eraseData(java.lang.String accessPwd,
                         int filterBank,
                         int filterPtr,
                         int filterCnt,
                         java.lang.String filterData,
                         int bank,
                         int ptr,
                         int cnt)
        擦除指定标签的数据，被擦除的数据块其内容将被设置成0.(Clean specific tag data, data block after cleaned will be set to 0. )
        Specified by:
        eraseData in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        accessPwd - 访问密码，4个字节 （accessPwd access password, 4 bytes）
        filterBank - 过滤的存储区(Filtered banks) IUHF.Bank_EPC、IUHF.Bank_TID、IUHF.Bank_USER
        filterPtr - 过滤的起始地址(the starting address of the filter)
        filterCnt - 过滤数据长度,单位:bit,当过滤的数据长度为0时，表示无过滤。(filterCnt Filter data length ,unit: bit, when the filtered data length is 0, it means no filtering)
        filterData - 过滤数据(filter data)
        bank - 擦除的数据区域(Cleaned data block):IUHF.Bank_RESERVED、 IUHF.Bank_EPC、IUHF.Bank_TID、IUHF.Bank_USER
        ptr - 擦除的起始地址,单位:字 (erase start address,Unit: word)
        cnt - 擦除的数据长度,单位:字 (erased data length,Unit: word)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • eraseData

        public boolean eraseData(java.lang.String accessPwd,
                         int bank,
                         int ptr,
                         int cnt)
        擦除数据，被擦除的数据块其内容将被设置成0. (Data block that has been cleaned will be setup to 0.)
        Specified by:
        eraseData in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        accessPwd - ACCESS PASSWORD (4 bites)
        bank - 擦除的数据区域(Cleaned data block) IUHF.Bank_RESERVED、 IUHF.Bank_EPC、IUHF.Bank_TID、IUHF.Bank_USER
        ptr - 擦除的起始地址,单位:字 (erase start address,Unit: word)
        cnt - 擦除的数据长度,单位:字 (erased data length,Unit: word)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • setFilter

        public boolean setFilter(int bank,
                         int ptr,
                         int cnt,
                         java.lang.String data)
        设置循环盘点符合过滤条件的标签，不符合过滤条件的标签将不会上传。注意：必须在循环盘点标签之前设置
        Set up a round-robin inventory of tags that meet the filter conditions, and tags that do not meet the filter conditions will not be uploaded. Note: Must be set before cycle count label
        Specified by:
        setFilter in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        bank - 过滤的存储区(filtered banks) IUHF.Bank_EPC、IUHF.Bank_TID、IUHF.Bank_USER
        ptr - 过滤的起始地址,单位：bit (the starting address of the filter，Unit: bit)
        cnt - 过滤数据长度，单位:bit,当过滤的数据长度为0时，表示无过滤 (Filter data length (unit: bit), when the filtered data length is 0, it means no filtering)
        data - 过滤的数据，十六进制数据 (filtered data, hexadecimal data)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • killTag

        public boolean killTag(java.lang.String killPwd)
        销毁指定标签 ,默认密码(0x00 0x00 0x00 0x00)不能执行销毁
        Destroy the label, the default password (0x00 0x00 0x00 0x00) cannot be destroyed
        Specified by:
        killTag in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        killPwd - 销毁密码(destroy password)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • killTag

        public boolean killTag(java.lang.String killPwd,
                       int filterBank,
                       int filterPtr,
                       int filterCnt,
                       java.lang.String filterData)
        销毁指定标签 ,默认密码(0x00 0x00 0x00 0x00)不能执行销毁
        Destroy the specified label, the default password (0x00 0x00 0x00 0x00) cannot be destroyed
        Specified by:
        killTag in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        killPwd - 销毁密码(destroy password)
        filterBank - 过滤的存储区(Filtered banks) IUHF.Bank_EPC、IUHF.Bank_TID、IUHF.Bank_USER
        filterPtr - 过滤的起始地址(the starting address of the filter)
        filterCnt - 过滤数据长度,单位:bit,当过滤的数据长度为0时，表示无过滤。(Filter data length ,unit: bit, when the filtered data length is 0, it means no filtering)
        filterData - 过滤数据(filter data)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • setProtocol

        public boolean setProtocol(int protocol)
        设置协议(Set protocol)
        Specified by:
        setProtocol in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        protocol - 0x00： ISO18000-6C
        0x01 ：GB/T 29768
        0x02 ： GJB 7377.1
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • getProtocol

        public int getProtocol()
        获取协议(Get the protocol)
        Specified by:
        getProtocol in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        0x00:ISO18000-6C, 0x01:GB/T 29768, 0x02:GJB 7377.1; 返回-1表示获取失败
        0x00:ISO18000-6C, 0x01:GB/T 29768, 0x02:GJB 7377.1; return -1 means the acquisition failed

      • setFreHop

        public boolean setFreHop(float fre)
        设置模块频点(Setup frequency Hop)
        Specified by:
        setFreHop in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        fre - 要设置的频点((frequency need to be set))
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • setRFLink

        public boolean setRFLink(int mode)
        设置链路参数
        Setup RFlink
        Specified by:
        setRFLink in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        mode - 0-PR ASK/Miller8/160KHz
        1-PR ASK/Miller4/250KHz
        2-PR ASK/Miller4/320KHz
        3-PR ASK/Miller4/640KHz
        4-PR ASK/Miller2/320KHz
        5-PR ASK/Miller2/640KHz
        10-Gen2X/Miller8/160KHz
        11-Gen2X/Miller4/250KHz
        12-Gen2X/Miller4/320KHz
        13-Gen2x/Miller4/640KHz
        14-Gen2X/Miller2/320KHz
        15-Gen2X/Miller2/640KHz
        20-Autoset/Miller8/160KHz
        21-Autoset/Miller4/250KHz
        22-Autoset/Miller4/320KHz
        23-Autoset/Miller4/640KHz
        24-Autoset/Miller2/320KHz
        25-Autoget/Miller2/640KHz
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • getRFLink

        public int getRFLink()
        获取链路参数
        acquire link parameter
        Specified by:
        getRFLink in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        -1:失败(failure)
        0-PR ASK/Miller8/160KHz
        1-PR ASK/Miller4/250KHz
        2-PR ASK/Miller4/320KHz
        3-PR ASK/Miller4/640KHz
        4-PR ASK/Miller2/320KHz
        5-PR ASK/Miller2/640KHz
        10-Gen2X/Miller8/160KHz
        11-Gen2X/Miller4/250KHz
        12-Gen2X/Miller4/320KHz
        13-Gen2x/Miller4/640KHz
        14-Gen2X/Miller2/320KHz
        15-Gen2X/Miller2/640KHz
        20-Autoset/Miller8/160KHz
        21-Autoset/Miller4/250KHz
        22-Autoset/Miller4/320KHz
        23-Autoset/Miller4/640KHz
        24-Autoset/Miller2/320KHz
        25-Autoget/Miller2/640KHz

      • setFastID

        public boolean setFastID(boolean enalbe)
        开关FastID功能 (Switch FastID function)
        Specified by:
        setFastID in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        enalbe - true：开(on)，false：关(off)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • setTagFocus

        public boolean setTagFocus(boolean enalbe)
        开关TagFocus功能(Switch TagFocus function)
        Specified by:
        setTagFocus in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        enalbe - true：开(on)，false：关(off)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • setEPCMode

        public boolean setEPCMode()
        设置盘点模式为EPC，只返回标签的EPC数据 (Set the inventory mode to EPC, and only return the EPC data of the label)
        Specified by:
        setEPCMode in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • setEPCAndTIDMode

        public boolean setEPCAndTIDMode()
        设置盘点模式为EPC+TID，返回标签的EPC+TID数据 (Set the inventory mode to EPC+TID, and return the EPC+TID data of the label)
        Specified by:
        setEPCAndTIDMode in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • setEPCAndTIDUserMode

        public boolean setEPCAndTIDUserMode(int user_prt,
                                    int user_len)
        设置盘点模式为EPC+TID+USER，返回标签的EPC+TID+USER数据 (Set the inventory mode to EPC+TID+USER, and return the EPC+TID+USER data of the label)
        Specified by:
        setEPCAndTIDUserMode in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        user_prt - USER区起始地址 (USER area start address)
        user_len - USER区长度(USER area length)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • getEPCAndTIDUserMode

        public InventoryModeEntity getEPCAndTIDUserMode()
        获取当前设置的盘点模式 (Get the currently set inventory mode)
        Specified by:
        getEPCAndTIDUserMode in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        返回盘点模式的对象(the object that returns the inventory mode)

      • getTemperature

        public int getTemperature()
        获取UHF模块温度 (Get UHF module temperature)
        Specified by:
        getTemperature in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        返回模块温度。 -1表示返回失败。(Returns the module temperature. -1 means return failure.)

      • uhfBlockPermalock

        public boolean uhfBlockPermalock(java.lang.String accessPwd,
                                 int filterBank,
                                 int filterPtr,
                                 int filterCnt,
                                 java.lang.String filterData,
                                 int ReadLock,
                                 int uBank,
                                 int uPtr,
                                 int uRange,
                                 byte[] uMaskbuf)
        数据块操作(Data block operation)
        Specified by:
        uhfBlockPermalock in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        accessPwd - 访问密码，4个字节十六进制数据 （accessPwd access password, 4 bytes of hexadecimal data）
        filterBank - 过滤的存储区(Filtered banks) IUHF.Bank_EPC、IUHF.Bank_TID、IUHF.Bank_USER
        filterPtr - 过滤的起始地址(the starting address of the filter)
        filterCnt - 过滤数据长度,单位:bit,当过滤的数据长度为0时，表示无过滤。(Filter data length ,unit: bit, when the filtered data length is 0, it means no filtering)
        filterData - 过滤数据(filter data)
        ReadLock - 0表示读设置 1表示锁设置（0 means read setting 1 means lock setting）
        uBank - 存储区域 (storage area)IUHF.Bank_RESERVED、IUHF.Bank_EPC、IUHF.Bank_TID、IUHF.Bank_USER
        uPtr - 存储区域起始地址 ，默认为0，其中 1个块单元为16个块 (start address of storage area, the default is 0, of which 1 block unit is 16 blocks)
        uRange - 存储区域结束范围，默认为1，其中 1个块单元为16个块 (storage area end range, the default is 1, of which 1 block unit is 16 blocks)
        uMaskbuf - 设置锁MSAK， 高位在前，每个bit 代表为1个块，默认为2字节 ( set the lock MSAK, high order first, each bit represents 1 block, the default is 2 bytes)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • setGen2

        public boolean setGen2(Gen2Entity entity)
        设置GEN2参数值 (Set GEN2 parameter value)
        Specified by:
        setGen2 in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        entity - GEN2参数实体对象(GEN2 parameter entity object)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • getGen2

        public Gen2Entity getGen2()
        获取GEN2参数值(Get GEN2 parameter value)
        Specified by:
        getGen2 in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        GEN2参数值实体对象 (GEN2 parameter value entity object)

      • setPwm

        public boolean setPwm(int WorkTime,
                      int WaitTime)
        设置占空比(Set the duty cycle)
        Specified by:
        setPwm in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        WorkTime - 工作时间(working time)（0~255 ms）
        WaitTime - 空闲时间(idle time)（0~255 ms）
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • getPwm

        public int[] getPwm()
        获取占空比 (Get the duty cycle)
        Specified by:
        getPwm in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        [0]工作时间，[1]等待时间;单位为毫秒。失败返回null
        [0] Working time, [1] Waiting time; the unit is milliseconds. return null on failure

      • setCW

        public boolean setCW(int flag)
        设置连续波(continuous waves)
        Specified by:
        setCW in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        flag - 1:开(on)， 0:关(off)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • getCW

        public int getCW()
        获取连续波状态(Get CW status)
        Specified by:
        getCW in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        1:打开 0:关闭 ，返回-1表示获取失败
        1: open 0: close , return -1 means the acquisition failed

      • uhfJump2Boot

        public boolean uhfJump2Boot()
        uhf固件进入boot模式准备升级,调用此函数后需要延时2秒再调用 uhfStartUpdate() (uhf firmware enters boot mode to prepare for upgrade)
        Specified by:
        uhfJump2Boot in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • uhfJump2BootToSTM32

        public boolean uhfJump2BootToSTM32()
        uhf主板进入boot模式准备升级,调用此函数后需要延时2秒再调用 uhfStartUpdate() (uhf firmware enters boot mode to prepare for upgrade)
        Specified by:
        uhfJump2BootToSTM32 in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • uhfStartUpdate

        public boolean uhfStartUpdate()
        开始升级UHF固件,调用此函数后需要延时2秒再调用 uhfUpdating(byte[] buff) (Start to upgrade UHF firmware)
        Specified by:
        uhfStartUpdate in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • uhfUpdating

        public boolean uhfUpdating(byte[] buff)
        发送uhf升级包 (Send uhf upgrade package)
        Specified by:
        uhfUpdating in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        buff - uhf固件数据包，每次固定发送64字节数据。(buff uhf firmware data packet, 64 bytes of data are sent each time.)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • uhfStopUpdate

        public boolean uhfStopUpdate()
        停止升级UHF固件(Stop upgrading UHF firmware)
        Specified by:
        uhfStopUpdate in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • getBeep

        public char[] getBeep()
        获取蜂鸣器的状态(Get the status of the buzzer)
        Specified by:
        getBeep in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        [0]表示蜂鸣器状态,0:关，1:开。 返回null表示获取失败
        [0] indicates the buzzer status, 0: off, 1: on. Returning null indicates that the acquisition failed

      • setBeep

        public boolean setBeep(int mode)
        开关蜂鸣器，打开蜂鸣器后盘点到标签会响应蜂鸣器。(Turn the buzzer on and off, and the label will respond to the buzzer after turning on the buzzer.)
        Specified by:
        setBeep in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        mode - 0:关闭(off) 1:打开(on)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

                         byte output2,
                         byte output3,
                         byte output4,
                         byte relay)
        Specified by:
        setGPOWYD in interface IUR4

      • setGPO

        public boolean setGPO(byte output1,
                      byte output2,
                      byte relay)
        设置GPIO的输出状态(Set the output state of GPIO)
        Specified by:
        setGPO in interface IUR4
        Parameters:
        output1 - 0:表低电平(means low level) 1:表示高电平(means high level)
        output2 - 0:表低电平(means low level) 1:表示高电平(means high level)
        relay - 继电器(relay relay) 0:断开(open) 1:闭合(closed)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • setGpoOnUR1A

        public boolean setGpoOnUR1A(byte output1,
                            byte output2)
        设置UR1A设备GPIO的输出状态(Set the output state of the GPIO on the UR1A device.)
        Specified by:
        setGpoOnUR1A in interface IUR4
        Parameters:
        output1 - 0:表低电平(means low level) 1:表示高电平(means high level)
        output2 - 0:表低电平(means low level) 1:表示高电平(means high level)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • getGPI

        public java.util.List<GPIStateEntity> getGPI()
        获取GPIO的输入状态(Get GPIO input state)
        Specified by:
        getGPI in interface IUR4
        Returns:
        返回GPIO输入状态，null表示获取失败 (returns the GPIO input status, null means the acquisition failed)

      • setAntenna

        public boolean setAntenna(java.util.List<AntennaState> antStatus)
        设置天线启用状态(Set the antenna enable state)
        Specified by:
        setAntenna in interface IMultipleAntenna
        Parameters:
        antStatus - 天线参数(Antenna parameter)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • getAntenna

        Specified by:
        getAntenna in interface IMultipleAntenna
        Returns:
        返回天线启用状态，null表示获取失败(returns the antenna enable status, null means the acquisition failed)

        还原出厂设置(Restore factory settings)
        Specified by:
        factoryReset in interface IUR4
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • setIPAndPort

        public boolean setIPAndPort(ReaderIPEntity readerIPEntity)
        设置UHF读写器IP和端口信息(Set UHF reader IP and port information) Sample code: UhfIpConfig ipconfig=new UhfIpConfig(); uhfIpConfig.setIp("192.168.99.200"); uhfIpConfig.setPort(8888); uhfIpConfig.setGateway(192.168.99.1); uhfIpConfig.setSubnetMask(255.255.255.0);
        Specified by:
        setIPAndPort in interface IUR4
        Parameters:
        readerIPEntity - IP和端口信息，目前只支持ipv4 IP,网关,子网掩码，端口 (uhfIpConfig IP and port information, currently only supports ipv4 IP, gateway, subnet mask, port)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • getIPAndPort

        public ReaderIPEntity getIPAndPort()
        获取UHF读写器IP和端口信息(Get UHF reader IP and port information)
        Specified by:
        getIPAndPort in interface IUR4
        Returns:
        返回HF读写器IP和端口信息 (returns the IP and port information of the HF reader)

      • setWorkMode

        public boolean setWorkMode(int mode)
        设置UHF工作模式 (Set UHF working mode)
        Specified by:
        setWorkMode in interface IUR4
        Parameters:
        mode - 0:命令工作模式(command working mode) 1:自动工作模式(automatic working mode)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • getWorkMode

        public int getWorkMode()
        获取UHF模块工作模式(Get the working mode of the UHF module)
        Specified by:
        getWorkMode in interface IUR4
        Returns:
        0:命令工作模式(command working mode) 1:自动工作模式(automatic working mode)

      • setDestinationIPAndPort

        public boolean setDestinationIPAndPort(ReaderIPEntity readerIPEntity)
        设置目标IP地址，当使用自动模式和触发模式的时候，数据会自动上传到此地址. (Set the target IP address, when using the automatic mode and trigger mode, the data will be automatically uploaded to this address.)
        Specified by:
        setDestinationIPAndPort in interface IUR4
        Parameters:
        readerIPEntity - uhfIpConfig
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • getDestinationIPAndPort

        public ReaderIPEntity getDestinationIPAndPort()
        获取目标IP地址,当使用自动模式和触发模式的时候，数据会自动上传到此地址。(Get the target IP address, when using the automatic mode and trigger mode, the data will be automatically uploaded to this address.)
        Specified by:
        getDestinationIPAndPort in interface IUR4
        Returns:
        获取失败返回null，获取成功返回目标ip地址和端口 (Returns null if the acquisition fails, and returns the target ip address and port if the acquisition is successful)

      • getAntennaReturnLoss

        public java.util.List<ReturnLossEntity> getAntennaReturnLoss()
        获取回波损耗 (Obtain the return loss of the antenna.)
        Specified by:
        getAntennaReturnLoss in interface IUR4
        Returns:
        List

      • getAntennaConnectState

        public java.util.List<AntennaConnectState> getAntennaConnectState()
        Description copied from interface: IUR4
        获取天线连接状态(Get antenna connection status.)
        Specified by:
        getAntennaConnectState in interface IUR4
        Returns:
        List

      • startInventoryTag

        public boolean startInventoryTag(InventoryParameter inventoryParameter)
        Description copied from interface: IUR4
        开始循环识别标签。 获取标签数据有两种方式，只能二选一，推荐使用方式一。
        Begin looping through the identification labels. There are two ways to obtain label data, only one of the two can be selected. It is recommended to use method one.

        方式一:通过 IUHF.setInventoryCallback(IUHFInventoryCallback inventoryCallback) 这个回调接口获取标签数据，需要在开始盘点之前调用setInventoryCallback方法。
        Method 1: Get the label data through the callback interface IUHF.setInventoryCallback(IUHFInventoryCallback inventoryCallback), you need to call the setInventoryCallback method before starting the inventory.

        方式二:创建一个子线程，在子线程里面通过调用readTagFromBuffer()方法获取标签数据。详情请参见IUHF.readTagFromBuffer()。
        Method 2: Create a sub-thread, and get the tag data by calling the readTagFromBuffer() method in the sub-thread. See IUHF.readTagFromBuffer() for details.

        备注：开启循环识别标签后模块只能响应IUHF.stopInventory()函数 。
        Note: The module can only respond to the IUHF.stopInventory() function after the loop identification tag is turned on.
        Specified by:
        startInventoryTag in interface IUHF
        Specified by:
        startInventoryTag in interface IUR4
        Overrides:
        startInventoryTag in class RFIDWithUHFBase
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • setFastInventoryMode

        public boolean setFastInventoryMode(FastInventoryEntity entity)
        Description copied from interface: IUHF
        setFastInventory
        Specified by:
        setFastInventoryMode in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        entity - 0x00,close； 0x01：CrID16， 0x02：CrStoredCRC，0x03：CrRN16，0x04：CrID32

      • getFastInventoryMode

        public FastInventoryEntity getFastInventoryMode()
        Specified by:
        getFastInventoryMode in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        0x00,close； 0x01：CrID16， 0x02：CrStoredCRC，0x03：CrRN16，0x04：CrID32

                        int power)
        设置天线功率 (Set the antenna power)
        Specified by:
        setPower in interface IMultipleAntenna
        Parameters:
        ant - 天线号(antenna)
        power - 功率(power)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • getPower

        public int getPower(AntennaNameEnum ant)
        读取单个天线功率(Read the power of a single antenna)
        Specified by:
        getPower in interface IMultipleAntenna
        Returns:
        返回功率，返回-1为失败 (return power, return -1 for failure)

      • getPowerAll

        public java.util.List<AntennaPowerEntity> getPowerAll()
        获取所有天线功率(Read the power of all antenna)
        Specified by:
        getPowerAll in interface IMultipleAntenna
        Returns:
        返回功率，返回null为失败 (return power, return null for failure)

      • marginRead

        public boolean marginRead(java.lang.String accessPwd,
                          FilterEntity filterEntity,
                          int bank,
                          int ptr,
                          int cnt,
                          java.lang.String marginReadData)
        MarginRead
        Specified by:
        marginRead in interface IUHF
        Specified by:
        marginRead in interface IUR4
        Overrides:
        marginRead in class RFIDWithUHFBase
        Parameters:
        accessPwd - ACCESS PASSWORD (4 bites)
        filterEntity - Filter tag
        bank - 标签的存储区(Storage area):IUHF.Bank_RESERVED、IUHF.Bank_EPC、IUHF.Bank_TID、IUHF.Bank_USER
        ptr - 起始地址的偏移量(start address(unit: word))
        cnt - 数据的长度（Word为单位，不能为0）(Data length(Word is unit, cannot be 0))
        marginReadData - 十六进制数据 (Data format should be hexvalue)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(fail)

      • setProtectedModeAndShortRangeMode

        public boolean setProtectedModeAndShortRangeMode(java.lang.String accessPwd,
                                                 FilterEntity filterEntity,
                                                 boolean isEnalbeProtectedMode,
                                                 boolean isEnableShortRangeMode)
        Set Protected Mode And Short Range Mode
        Specified by:
        setProtectedModeAndShortRangeMode in interface IUHF
        Specified by:
        setProtectedModeAndShortRangeMode in interface IUR4
        Overrides:
        setProtectedModeAndShortRangeMode in class RFIDWithUHFBase
        Parameters:
        accessPwd - ACCESS PASSWORD (4 bites)
        filterEntity - Filter tag
        isEnalbeProtectedMode - true:Enable Protected Mode false：disable Protected Mode
        isEnableShortRangeMode - true:Enable Short Range Mode false：disable Short Range Mode
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)
